\tzpentry{ID4701}{Partial Magnetic Flux Wave Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4701 introduces Partial Magnetic Flux Wave Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\frac{1}{c_s^2}\\frac{\\partial^2 \\Phi}{\\partial t^2} - \\nabla^2 \\Phi - \\frac{2}{c_s^2}\\boldsymbol{\\omega} \\cdot (\\mathbf{r} \\times \\nabla)\\frac{\\partial \\Phi}{\\partial t} = 0\n\\end{equation}
